title: Visible Powdered Snow
description: This texture pack makes powdered snow a bit more blue, so that you never fall into powdered snow ever again.
body:
**This texture pack makes powdered snow more visible by making it bluer.** 

It was made by adding a translucent blue overlay to the vanilla minecraft powdered snow texture.

**Important: There are two versions in the versions tab, one is very visible, one is slightly visible and less protruding, the blue is less opaque in the former. Choose correctly when downloading the pack.**
